MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-09-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Keith Herman, 415-559-2754 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendat argues he owes the debt but not the total amount in dispute. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

Off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. The Court permits Mr. Herman to file an amended answer by 12/17/18 disputing the amount of debt sought by Midland Funding.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
